hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */programs/zellij/layouts/basic.kdl) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just edited basic.kdl. Update the Zellij basic layout diagram in CLAUDE.md to reflect the new layout."}}' ;; esac; }

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && cd "$root" && update-claude-code && nix flake update; if ! git diff --quiet -- packages/claude-code.nix flake.lock; then branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "ERROR: files changed but current branch is main -- cannot commit. Aborting PR creation." >&2; exit 1; fi; git add packages/claude-code.nix flake.lock && git commit -m 'chore: update flake.lock and claude-code'; fi; fi
